headline: Piper Sandler Trims Becton Dickinson (BDX) PT on Model Revisions
summary: Becton, Dickinson and Company (NYSE:BDX) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Aristocrat Stocks to Buy in 2026. On April 17, Jason Bednar at Piper Sandler lowered the price target on Becton, Dickinson and Company (NYSE:BDX) to $159 from $170 and kept a Neutral rating. The firm adjusted parts of its Q2 revenue growth assumptions […]
